mapper.select: SELECT id, title_hr, title_en, where_hr, where_en, about_hr, about_en, when_iso, event_type, latitude, longitude, entrance_latitude, entrance_longitude, entry_instructions_hr, entry_instructions_en, visibility, participant_count FROM events WHERE visibility = 'public' ORDER BY when_iso ASC

SELECT id, title_hr, title_en, where_hr, where_en, about_hr, about_en, when_iso, event_type, latitude, longitude, entrance_latitude, entrance_longitude, entry_instructions_hr, entry_instructions_en, visibility, participant_count FROM events WHERE visibility = 'public' ORDER BY when_iso DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events WHERE visibility = 'public'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO events ( id, title_hr, title_en, where_hr, where_en, about_hr, about_en, when_iso, event_type, latitude, longitude, entrance_latitude, entrance_longitude, entry_instructions_hr, entry_instructions_en, visibility, participant_count ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{titleHr}, #{titleEn}, #{whereHr}, #{whereEn}, #{aboutHr}, #{aboutEn}, #{whenIso}, #{eventType}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{entranceLatitude}, #{entranceLongitude}, #{entryInstructionsHr}, #{entryInstructionsEn}, #{visibility}, #{participantCount} )
